summary: Frontend-only review for the Serbian Language First landing page. Verified all 12 required behaviors via Playwright on the public URL. All checks passed including navbar, hero, marquee, about, languages, services, location, footer, mobile sticky CTA, mobile menu, anchor navigation, and absence of price mentions. No console errors. No code changes were necessary.
critical_code_review_comments: All components are reasonably small and focused; no file >700 lines.
data-testid coverage is excellent across all required elements.
Phone link and address are consistently the same across Navbar/Hero/Services/Location/Footer/Sticky.
No backend coupling — purely static marketing page, as expected per the spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://learn-languages-63.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids defined as in the spec. Note: 'din' (in 'godinama') and 'cena' (in 'Ocena na Google-u') are substring false positives during the no-prices check; the page genuinely contains no RSD/€/din/cena/cene as standalone price terms.
tests_executed: Navbar visible with logo 'Language First.' and phone 064 1140600 (tel:+381641140600) — PASS

Services has 4 cards (Grupni/Individualni/Online/Časovi za odrasle) + 3-level strip; services-call-button href = tel:+381641140600 — PASS
Location shows address, 21000, phone, weekly days including 'Zatvoreno'; iframe map visible; address-link, location-call-button, hours-call-button hrefs correct — PASS
Footer visible with footer-call (tel:) and footer-address (maps) — PASS
Mobile 390px: sticky-mobile-call visible with tel: href; mobile toggle opens menu with all 4 links + mobile call button — PASS
No price/currency mentions (RSD/€/din/cena/cene) as actual price words — PASS (only false-positive substrings)
Anchor links scroll target sections #jezici/#casovi/#o-nama/#lokacija into view — PASS
No JS console errors on load — PASS
